div.p: By an exchange of notes signed at Guatemala City, July 27 and 30, 1954, and entered into force on the latter date, the United States agreed to permit the transfer to Guatemala of military equipment and matériel, including F–51 aircraft, subject to certain understandings. The notes were transmitted to the Department of State, under cover of despatch 211, from Guatemala City, dated September 14, 1954, not printed (714.5622/9–1454). For text of the notes, see United States Treaties and Other International Agreements (UST), volume 5 (pt. 2), page 1926, or TIAS No. 3059.
